top_signals.title: Commission proposes to extend temporary protection of people fleeing Ukraine for an additional year
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 26 Jun 2026 Today, the Commission is proposing to extend for an additional year the temporary protection for people fleeing Russia's war of aggression against Ukraine, while taking into account Ukraine's overall ability to defend itself. By doing so, the Commission reinforces its unwavering commitment to support Ukraine for as long as it takes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: When killing the messenger becomes a strategy of war
top_signals.summary: Record journalist deaths in Gaza raise urgent questions about war, accountability and the erosion of independent reporting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump’s march of folly in Iran
top_signals.summary: It did not occur to the Trump administration that Iran would have a plan: retaliate with long-range strikes and close the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Transcript of the Governor's pooled broadcast interview given on 18 June 2026
top_signals.summary: Following the publication of the Monetary Policy Summary and minutes of the Monetary Policy Committee meeting

top_signals.title: Central reservations − speech by Alan Taylor
top_signals.summary: Given at the Barclays-CEPR Monetary Policy Forum, London
